phrases.text_local: Onde fica o Museu do Tesouro?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AW moo-ZEHOO DOO teh-ZOHW-roo?
phrases.cultural_note: Combined tickets often include cathedral and museum entry.

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para o Museu do Tesouro.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AW moo-ZEHOO DOO teh-ZOHW-roo.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs to the Treasury Museum.

responses.english: Follow the signs to the Treasury Museum.
responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AW moo-ZEHOO DOO teh-ZOHW-roo.
responses.french: Siga as placas para o Museu do Tesouro.

phrases.text_local: Onde fica a loja de recordações?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AH LAW-zhuh DIH rih-koo-ruh-duh-SOHNYSH?
phrases.cultural_note: Shops sell local ceramics, books, and religious souvenirs.

likely_response.local: Pode perguntar na bilheteira ou ao segurança.
likely_response.pronunciation: PAW-dih peh-ruh-goonng-TAHR NUH bee-lyih-TAY-ruh OHW OW seh-goo-RAHNNG-suh.
likely_response.translation_en: You can ask at the ticket office or the security guard.

responses.english: You can ask at the ticket office or the security guard.
responses.phonetic: PAW-dih peh-ruh-goonng-TAHR NUH bee-lyih-TAY-ruh OHW OW seh-goo-RAHNNG-suh.
responses.french: Pode perguntar na bilheteira ou ao segurança.

phrases.text_local: Onde começa a caminhada sobre as naves?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih koo-MEH-suh AH kuh-mee-NYAH-duh SOHB-rih UHSH NAH-vihsh?
phrases.cultural_note: The walkway provides unique architectural perspectives of the nave.

likely_response.local: Bom dia, acesso pela Torre do Sino.
likely_response.pronunciation: BOHNG DEEUH, uh-SEH-soo PEH-luh TAW-rih DOO SEE-noo.
likely_response.translation_en: Good morning, entrance via the bell tower.

responses.english: Good morning, entrance via the bell tower.
responses.phonetic: BOHNG DEEUH, uh-SEH-soo PEH-luh TAW-rih DOO SEE-noo.
responses.french: Bom dia, acesso pela Torre do Sino.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the Treasury Museum is
phrases.text_local: Onde fica o Museu do Tesouro?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AW moo-ZEHOO DOO teh-ZOHW-roo?
phrases.cultural_note: The museum displays religious artifacts; modest attire is required.

likely_response.local: Bom dia. Siga as placas para o Museu do Tesouro.
likely_response.pronunciation: BOHNG DEEUH. SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AW moo-ZEHOO DOO teh-ZOHW-roo.
likely_response.translation_en: Good morning. Follow the signs to the Treasury Museum.

responses.english: Good morning. Follow the signs to the Treasury Museum.
responses.phonetic: BOHNG DEEUH. SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AW moo-ZEHOO DOO teh-ZOHW-roo.
responses.french: Bom dia. Siga as placas para o Museu do Tesouro.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where to access the roof walk
phrases.text_local: Onde começa o caminho sobre as naves?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih koo-MEH-suh AW kuh-MEE-nyoo SOHB-rih UHSH NAH-vihsh?
phrases.cultural_note: The elevated walkway offers panoramic city views; wear flat shoes.

likely_response.local: Bom dia, acesso pela Torre do Sino.
likely_response.pronunciation: BOHNG DEEUH, uh-SEH-soo PEH-luh TAW-rih DOO SEE-noo.
likely_response.translation_en: Good morning, access is via the bell tower.

responses.english: Good morning, access is via the bell tower.
responses.phonetic: BOHNG DEEUH, uh-SEH-soo PEH-luh TAW-rih DOO SEE-noo.
responses.french: Bom dia, acesso pela Torre do Sino.

phrases.cultural_note: Tickets cover the cathedral, museum, and cloister access.

likely_response.local: A bilheteira fica na entrada da catedral.
likely_response.pronunciation: AH bee-lyih-TAY-ruh FEE-kuh NUH ayngt-RAH-duh DUH kuh-tihd-RAHL.
likely_response.translation_en: The ticket office is at the entrance of the cathedral.

responses.english: The ticket office is at the entrance of the cathedral.
responses.phonetic: AH bee-lyih-TAY-ruh FEE-kuh NUH ayngt-RAH-duh DUH kuh-tihd-RAHL.
responses.french: A bilheteira fica na entrada da catedral.

phrases.cultural_note: The cloister is a historic quiet zone; maintain low voices.

likely_response.local: Pergunte ao bilheteiro como aceder ao claustro gótico.
likely_response.pronunciation: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih OW bee-lyih-TAY-roo KOH-moo uh-sih-DEHR OW KLOWSHT-roo GAW-tee-koo.
likely_response.translation_en: Ask the ticket seller how to access the Gothic cloister.

responses.english: Ask the ticket seller how to access the Gothic cloister.
responses.phonetic: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih OW bee-lyih-TAY-roo KOH-moo uh-sih-DEHR OW KLOWSHT-roo GAW-tee-koo.
responses.french: Pergunte ao bilheteiro como aceder ao claustro gótico.

phrases.text_local: Onde é o museu do tesouro?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih EH AW moo-ZEHOO DOO teh-ZOHW-roo?
phrases.cultural_note: O Museu do Tesouro está localizado no claustro gótico da Sé de Évora.

likely_response.local: Bom dia, fica no claustro gótico.
likely_response.pronunciation: BOHNG DEEUH, FEE-kuh NOO KLOWSHT-roo GAW-tee-koo.
likely_response.translation_en: Good morning, it is in the Gothic cloister.

responses.english: Good morning, it is in the Gothic cloister.
responses.phonetic: BOHNG DEEUH, FEE-kuh NOO KLOWSHT-roo GAW-tee-koo.
responses.french: Bom dia, fica no claustro gótico.
